body.body:
basal_ganglia.py (MEDIUM inertia — cognition/ — no behaviour change, refactor only).

BG scoring is the highest-traffic path. specificity_bonus and intent_gate logic are inline in the main scoring loop. Extract into:
  _apply_intent_gate(habit, parsed_intent) -> bool
  _apply_specificity_bonus(habit, context) -> float

No logic changes — identical scoring before and after. Named boundaries make each phase independently testable and readable.

SCOPE: basal_ganglia.py only. Do NOT touch brainstem/ or memory/models.py.

TESTS: existing BG tests must pass unchanged. Add unit tests for each extracted method in isolation (intent_gate returns False on question intent; specificity_bonus > 0 when conditions field present).

FORENSIC LOGGING: none needed — pure refactor.
body.title: BG scoring: extract intent_gate and specificity_bonus into named phases
body.result: Extracted intent_gate and specificity_bonus into named phases for independent testability. 424 tests passing including 13 new unit tests. Commit 02741205 pushed.
